{{Infobox madra
| name = Sandviper madra
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Sandviper madra]] draws on [[aura]] from toxins, poison, and corrosion.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Sandviper madra]] is a [[Path]] born in the swamp.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Sandviper madra]] is a type of green madra.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
